allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Fractional Shares & Autonomous Execution Monitor

Core Changes:
- Enable fractional share trading \(order_executor.py, portfolio_manager.py\)
- Add autonomous execution monitor with zero LLM costs \(execution_monitor.py\)
- Pure Python rule-based monitoring \(stop-losses, dip-buying\)
- 5-minute interval checks during market hours

MCP Integration:
- Complete MCP server setup for Claude Code integration
- 4 analysis tools: analyze_stock, technical_analysis, portfolio_analysis, macro_analysis
- AutoInvestor agent configuration \(.claude/ settings\)

Portfolio Management:
- Trading strategy documentation \(trading_strategy.md\)
- Portfolio state tracking \(portfolio_state.json\)
- Launcher scripts for paper and live trading

Architecture:
- Strategy Agent: Claude Sonnet 4.5 for complex analysis \(~$3/year\)
- Execution Monitor: Pure Python for continuous monitoring \($0/year\)
- Two-agent system with mandatory weekly human reviews

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
